title: Add unit tests to run.go
body:
Trying to cover `run.go` as much as possible.

* Changed `addHostsToFile` to make it easy to test
* Added unit-tests to `addHosts`, `addHostsToFile` and `addRlimits`

comments.body: LGTM and happy green test buttons.  I feel your .travis.yml pain @ripcurld, it's been biting me lately too.

:pushpin: Commit be5c794 has been approved by `rhatdan`
